moments.title: World Cup Final 2026 Showdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates with the grand final on Sunday, July 19th, determining the world champions in football.

angles.name: Final Hype
angles.copy: Who's ready for the biggest game of the year? The World Cup Final is just days away – who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Local Support
angles.copy: All eyes on Sunday's World Cup Final! Will your pick lift the trophy? Let us know who you're backing!

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins its tournament play at Royal Birkdale from Thursday, July 16th to Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Golf Major Begins
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship gets underway this week at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Host
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready to host The Open Championship! Expect drama, birdies, and classic links golf from Thursday.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Just Wrapped Up
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon 2026 concluded yesterday, July 12th, after two weeks of thrilling tennis action.

angles.name: Wimbledon Afterglow
angles.copy: The grass courts have fallen silent! What was your favourite moment from Wimbledon 2026?

angles.name: Champions Crowned
angles.copy: Wimbledon 2026 saw new champions crowned and incredible stories unfold. Who impressed you most?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23rd-26th, promising a weekend of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Who's packing their bags for Latitude? The festival kicks off next week for another epic weekend!

angles.name: Arts & Music Escape
angles.copy: Beyond the music, Latitude brings comedy, theatre, and culture to Suffolk. What are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, is well underway, bringing daily drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Who's coupled up and who's cracking on? Love Island UK is delivering all the summer drama right now!

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Ready for tonight's dose of Love Island? What's the biggest bombshell you're expecting?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn Turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, influential singer-songwriter and guitarist for The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Folk Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th to The Byrds' Roger McGuinn! A true pioneer of folk-rock with that iconic 12-string sound.

moments.title: Deborah Cox Turns 52
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B singer Deborah Cox, known for hits like 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here', celebrates her 52nd birthday today.

angles.name: R&B Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 52nd birthday to the incredible R&B vocalist Deborah Cox! Still sounds amazing.

moments.title: Chris Cross Turns 74
moments.blurb: Chris Cross, the bassist and co-founder of the pioneering synth-pop band Ultravox, celebrates his 74th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate Chris Cross of Ultravox turning 74! The driving force behind some iconic 80s tracks.

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt Turns 80
moments.blurb: The legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her incredible vocal range and genre-spanning career, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Vocal Icon
angles.copy: An absolute icon turns 80 on Wednesday! Happy birthday to the incomparable Linda Ronstadt.

moments.title: Joe Satriani Turns 70
moments.blurb: Virtuoso guitarist Joe Satriani, celebrated for his instrumental rock prowess, turns 70 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Shredding into his 70s! Happy birthday to the incredible Joe Satriani on Wednesday. What's your favourite Satch track?

moments.title: Olly Alexander Turns 36
moments.blurb: Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent UK Eurovision representative, celebrates his 36th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Big birthday wishes to Years & Years' Olly Alexander, turning 36 on Wednesday! What's your top track from him?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the dynamic drummer and co-founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: The legendary beat of The Police turns 74 this Thursday! Happy birthday to the one and only Stewart Copeland.

moments.title: Luke Hemmings Turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Birthday
angles.copy: 30 years young! Sending big birthday wishes to 5SOS frontman Luke Hemmings this Thursday. What's your fave 5SOS track?

moments.title: Luke Bryan Turns 50
moments.blurb: Country music superstar Luke Bryan, known for his chart-topping hits and energetic live shows, celebrates his 50th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Country Star's Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 50th birthday to country music's own Luke Bryan this Friday! Cheers to a half-century of great tunes.

moments.title: Wolfgang Flür Turns 79
moments.blurb: Wolfgang Flür, the original percussionist for the influential electronic music pioneers Kraftwerk, celebrates his 79th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Electronic Pioneer
angles.copy: A pioneer of electronic music turns 79 this Friday! Happy birthday to Kraftwerk's Wolfgang Flür.

moments.title: Geezer Butler Turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and primary lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Metal Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Black Sabbath's legendary bassist, Geezer Butler, this Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

moments.title: M.I.A. Turns 51
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, songwriter, and activist M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam) celebrates her 51st birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Trailblazing Artist
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the groundbreaking M.I.A. on Saturday! Her influence on music and culture is undeniable.

moments.title: Ricky Skaggs Turns 72
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning country and bluegrass artist Ricky Skaggs celebrates his 72nd birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Bluegrass Master
angles.copy: Celebrating 72 years of incredible music! Happy birthday to country and bluegrass legend Ricky Skaggs this Saturday.

moments.title: Martha Reeves Turns 85
moments.blurb: Martha Reeves, the iconic lead singer of Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Motown Legend
angles.copy: Dancing in the street to celebrate Martha Reeves' 85th birthday this Saturday! A true Motown legend.

moments.title: Brian May Turns 79
moments.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Rock royalty turns 79 this Sunday! Happy birthday to the iconic Brian May of Queen.

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: Guitar legend Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive blend of rock, blues, and Latin rhythms, celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Maestro
angles.copy: The maestro of the guitar turns 79 on Monday! Happy birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Are Here!
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are now breaking up or will be breaking up this week, marking the official start of the summer holidays.

angles.name: Schools Out
angles.copy: Freedom! School's out for summer for many across the UK. What are your big plans for the holidays?

angles.name: Local Summer Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here! What local adventures are you planning in Wales?
